# rldyour Cross-Tool Contract Matrix

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_contract_matrix.py from config/rldyour-contract.json. Do not edit by hand. -->

This matrix is the human-readable projection of the machine-readable rldyour contract. It documents how the same business mechanism maps to Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Antigravity CLI, and MiMoCode. The local validator proves the Claude Code adapter against files in this repository and requires non-local adapters to be explicitly mapped or marked adapter-specific.

- Schema version: `1`
- Verified on: `2026-06-09`
- Owner repository: `NDDev-it-com/rldyour-claudecode`

## Domains

| ID | Description | Claude | Codex | OpenCode | Gemini | MiMoCode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| browser | Browser validation, debugging, routing | rldyour-browser | rldyour-browser | rldyour-browser | native skills/agents | native skills/agents |
| design | Figma-to-code, UI systems, frontend architecture | rldyour-design | rldyour-design | rldyour-design | native skills/agents | native skills/agents |
| explore | Technical and web research | rldyour-explore | rldyour-explore | rldyour-explore | native skills/agents | native skills/agents |
| flow | SDLC lifecycle orchestration | rldyour-flow | rldyour-flow | rldyour-flow | native skills/agents | native skills/agents |
| lsps | Language-server routing, setup, health checks | rldyour-lsps | rldyour-lsps | rldyour-lsps | adapter-specific: not provided as a native surface | adapter-specific: not provided as a native surface |
| mcps | Single-owner MCP transport layer | rldyour-mcps | rldyour-mcps | rldyour-mcps | native MCP servers in .gemini/settings.json | native MCP servers in .mimocode/mimocode.jsonc |
| orchestrator | macOS cmux orchestrator and worker terminal roles | rldyour-orchestrator | rldyour-orchestrator | rldyour-orchestrator | worker-only: cmux-worker skill present; orchestrator unsupported | worker-only: cmux-worker skill present; orchestrator unsupported |
| rules | Quality, architecture, dependency, verification rules | rldyour-rules | rldyour-rules | rldyour-rules | adapter-specific: not provided as a native surface | native skills/agents via .mimocode/skills and .mimocode/command/rules-review.md |
| security | Defensive security guidance and review | rldyour-security | rldyour-security | rldyour-security | native skills/agents | native skills/agents |
| serena-mcp | Serena semantic code workflow and memory sync | rldyour-serena-mcp | rldyour-serena-mcp | rldyour-serena-mcp | native skills/agents via serena-curator agent and serena-memory-sync skill | native skills/agents via rldyour-memory-sync agent and serena-memory-sync skill |

## Public Flows

| ID | Description | Claude | Codex | OpenCode | Gemini | MiMoCode | Claude Path |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| design.ry-design | End-to-end design and UI implementation workflow | /rldyour-design:ry-design | $rldyour-design:ry-design | /ry-design | adapter-specific: not provided as a native command; covered by skills/design-review/SKILL.md and agents/design-reviewer.md | /design-review | `plugins/rldyour-design/commands/ry-design.md` |

## Agent Roles

| ID | Description | Claude | Codex | OpenCode | Gemini | MiMoCode | Claude Path |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| agent.explore.research | Isolated research explorer | ry-explore | research-explorer | ry-explore | codebase-investigator | adapter-specific: not provided as a named research agent; rldyour-plan agent provides read-only investigation | `plugins/rldyour-explore/agents/ry-explore.md` |
| agent.review.architecture | Architecture reviewer | flow-architecture-review | architecture-reviewer | flow-architecture-review | adapter-specific: not provided as a dedicated architecture reviewer agent | adapter-specific: not provided as a dedicated architecture reviewer agent; rldyour-review provides combined review | `plugins/rldyour-flow/agents/flow-architecture-review.md` |
| agent.review.consistency | Consistency reviewer | flow-consistency-review | consistency-reviewer | flow-consistency-review | adapter-specific: not provided as a dedicated consistency reviewer agent | adapter-specific: not provided as a dedicated consistency reviewer agent; rldyour-review provides combined review | `plugins/rldyour-flow/agents/flow-consistency-review.md` |
| agent.review.integration | Integration reviewer | flow-integration-review | covered by architecture-reviewer and quality-reviewer in Codex | flow-integration-review | adapter-specific: not provided as a dedicated integration reviewer agent | adapter-specific: not provided as a dedicated integration reviewer agent; rldyour-review provides combined review | `plugins/rldyour-flow/agents/flow-integration-review.md` |
| agent.review.quality | Quality reviewer | flow-quality-review | quality-reviewer | flow-quality-review | adapter-specific: not provided as a dedicated quality reviewer agent | rldyour-quality-review | `plugins/rldyour-flow/agents/flow-quality-review.md` |
| agent.review.security | Security reviewer | flow-security-review | security-audit | flow-security-review | security-reviewer | rldyour-security-review | `plugins/rldyour-flow/agents/flow-security-review.md` |
| agent.review.verification | Verification and test reviewer | flow-verification-review | test-reviewer | flow-verification-review | adapter-specific: not provided as a dedicated verification reviewer agent | adapter-specific: not provided as a dedicated verification reviewer agent | `plugins/rldyour-flow/agents/flow-verification-review.md` |
| agent.sync.serena-memory | Serena memory synchronization agent | flow-memory-sync | serena-sync | flow-memory-sync | serena-curator | rldyour-memory-sync | `plugins/rldyour-serena-mcp/agents/flow-memory-sync.md` |

## Hook Lifecycle

| ID | Description | Claude | Codex | OpenCode | Gemini | MiMoCode | Claude Path |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| session.start.worktree-bootstrap | Restore agent-only fullrepo context into new worktrees | rldyour-flow | session_start_worktree_bootstrap | shell.env or startup plugin event | adapter-specific: no worktree bootstrap hook; session_start_context.sh covers context load only | adapter-specific: no native hook lifecycle; not provided | `plugins/rldyour-flow/hooks/session_start_worktree_bootstrap.sh` |
| session.start.context | Load lightweight session context | rldyour-flow | session_start_context | shell.env or startup plugin event | session-start-context | adapter-specific: no native hook lifecycle; mimocode.jsonc has no hooks block | `plugins/rldyour-flow/hooks/session_start_context.sh` |
| prompt.submit.sync-context | Inject Serena workflow context before prompt processing | rldyour-serena-mcp | user_prompt_submit | prompt submit plugin event | adapter-specific: no UserPromptSubmit equivalent in Antigravity CLI hook events | adapter-specific: no native hook lifecycle; not provided | `plugins/rldyour-serena-mcp/hooks/user_prompt_submit.sh` |
| tool.pre.git-auto-sync-baseline | Record Serena baseline before git history-changing commands | rldyour-serena-mcp | prepare_auto_sync | tool.execute.before | before-tool-policy | adapter-specific: no native hook lifecycle; not provided | `plugins/rldyour-serena-mcp/hooks/prepare_auto_sync.sh` |
| tool.pre.ci-advisory | Advisory guard for manual-first GitHub Actions usage | rldyour-flow | pre_tool_use_ci_advisory | tool.execute.before | covered by before_tool_policy.sh which handles destructive shell/git operations via BeforeTool event | adapter-specific: no native hook lifecycle; not provided | `plugins/rldyour-flow/hooks/pre_tool_use_ci_advisory.sh` |
| tool.post.serena-sync-required | Mark Serena sync as required after git history-changing commands | rldyour-serena-mcp | mark_sync_required | tool.execute.after | adapter-specific: no PostToolUse equivalent; AfterAgent event approximates via after_agent_post_task_sync.sh | adapter-specific: no native hook lifecycle; not provided | `plugins/rldyour-serena-mcp/hooks/mark_sync_required.sh` |
| tool.post.commit-advice | Surface post-commit follow-up guidance | rldyour-flow | post_tool_use_commit_advice | tool.execute.after | adapter-specific: no PostToolUse equivalent; after_agent_post_task_sync.sh covers post-agent state reporting | adapter-specific: no native hook lifecycle; not provided | `plugins/rldyour-flow/hooks/post_tool_use_commit_advice.sh` |
| task.stop.memory-sync | Block final response when Serena memory sync is required via ordered flow dispatcher | rldyour-flow | stop_memory_sync | task stop plugin event | after-agent-post-task-sync | adapter-specific: no native hook lifecycle; not provided | `plugins/rldyour-flow/hooks/stop_lifecycle_dispatcher.sh` |
| task.stop.post-task-sync | Block final response when post-task sync is required | rldyour-flow | stop_post_task_sync | task stop plugin event | after-agent-post-task-sync | adapter-specific: no native hook lifecycle; not provided | `plugins/rldyour-flow/hooks/stop_lifecycle_dispatcher.sh` |

## CI Baseline

| ID | Description | Claude | Codex | OpenCode | Gemini | MiMoCode |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| validate-static | JSON schema, Python syntax, shell syntax, frontmatter, text hygiene | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` | adapter repository must provide equivalent static validation | adapter repository must provide equivalent static validation | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` |
| validate-inventory | Generated inventory freshness | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` | adapter repository must provide equivalent inventory validation | adapter repository must provide equivalent inventory validation | adapter repository must provide equivalent inventory validation | adapter repository must provide equivalent inventory validation |
| validate-contract | Cross-tool business contract and generated matrix freshness | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` | adapter repository must validate the same contract ID set | adapter repository must validate the same contract ID set | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` |
| validate-hooks-fixtures | Hook lifecycle smoke fixtures | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` | adapter repository must smoke hook fixtures | adapter repository must smoke hook/plugin-event fixtures | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` | adapter-specific: no hook fixtures; mimocode has no native hook lifecycle |
| pytest-unit | Unit tests for validators and scripts | `.github/workflows/pytest.yml` | adapter repository must run its unit test suite | adapter repository must run its unit test suite | `.github/workflows/pytest.yml` | `.github/workflows/pytest.yml` |
| native-cli-runtime-smoke | Native Claude plugin validator and runtime smoke | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` | adapter repository must run native CLI/runtime smoke when available | adapter repository must run native CLI/runtime smoke when available | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` |
| codeql-upload | CodeQL SARIF upload for public repo security analysis | `.github/workflows/codeql.yml` | adapter repository should run CodeQL or documented equivalent | adapter repository should run CodeQL or documented equivalent | `.github/workflows/codeql.yml` | `.github/workflows/codeql.yml` |
| dependency-review | Pull-request dependency diff review | `.github/workflows/dependency-review.yml` | adapter repository should run dependency review or documented equivalent | adapter repository should run dependency review or documented equivalent | `.github/workflows/dependency-review.yml` | `.github/workflows/dependency-review.yml` |
| secret-scan | Secret scan and security pattern scan | `.github/workflows/gitleaks.yml` | adapter repository must run secret scanning | adapter repository must run secret scanning | `.github/workflows/secret-scan.yml` | `.github/workflows/secret-scan.yml` |
| actionlint | GitHub workflow lint | `.github/workflows/actionlint.yml` | adapter repository must lint workflows | adapter repository must lint workflows | `.github/workflows/actionlint.yml` | `.github/workflows/actionlint.yml` |
| release-state | Version, changelog, manifests, tags, release manifest | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` | adapter repository must validate release state | adapter repository must validate release state | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` | `.github/workflows/validate.yml` |
| sbom | Release evidence bundle and SBOM-equivalent manifest | `.github/workflows/release.yml` | adapter repository should publish release evidence | adapter repository should publish release evidence | `.github/workflows/release.yml` | `.github/workflows/release.yml` |
